objective: Implement device binding revisions, transport-aware rebinding boundaries and per-device mutation lanes.
deliverables: Durable binding revisions pinned into every device step intent before dispatch.
USB minimum-evidence auto-rebind policy that Profiles can only strengthen, plus TCP/UART manual confirmation.
Per-device exclusive mutation lane with cross-device parallelism preserved.
